meanings.usage: 常指严重损坏物体的外观或完整性，也可指使身体致残
常用结构：despair of (doing) sth 对做某事不抱希望
不可数名词，常用搭配：in despair 陷入绝望
常用搭配：make a claim for sth 就某物提出索赔
指已订婚的男性，对应的女性形式为fiancee
不可数名词，常用搭配：for safekeeping 以妥善保管
不可数名词，常用搭配：to one's dismay 令某人惊愕的是
表示“灰烬”时常用复数形式ashes，不可数名词
后可直接接宾语，也可用于identify A as B 结构，指认出A是B
对应的男性形式为spokesman，复数形式为spokeswomen
主语通常为事件、故事等，表示内容和某人/事相关
常用结构：be concerned about 担忧...

phrases.usage: 表示“处理，应付”，后接问题、事件、人等作宾语

examples.en: The team deals with all kinds of customer complaints every day.
examples.zh: 这个团队每天处理各种各样的客户投诉。

examples.en: He is good at dealing with difficult situations.

phrases.usage: 表示“变成灰烬”，属于turn to sth的固定搭配，指转化为某种形态

examples.en: The old books turned to ash in the big fire.
examples.zh: 那些旧书在大火中化成了灰烬。

examples.en: All his hopes turned to ash when he heard the bad news.
examples.zh: 听到这个坏消息时，他所有的希望都破灭了。

phrases.usage: 连词短语，引导条件状语从句，意为“只要”，相当于as long as

examples.en: So long as you work hard, you will pass the exam.
examples.zh: 只要你努力学习，你就会通过考试。

examples.en: We can go out so long as it doesn't rain.
examples.zh: 只要不下雨，我们就可以出门。

phrases.usage: 固定搭配，表示“为了妥善保管”，在句中作目的状语

examples.en: He gave his important documents to his lawyer for safekeeping.
examples.zh: 他把自己的重要文件交给律师妥善保管。

examples.en: I put the diamond necklace in the bank for safekeeping.
examples.zh: 我把钻石项链放在银行妥善保存。

phrases.usage: 常用表达，表示“似乎，看起来”，用于描述不确定的情况或主观推测

examples.en: It seems that no one knows what happened last night.
examples.zh: 似乎没有人知道昨晚发生了什么。

examples.en: It seems he is not interested in the plan at all.
examples.zh: 看起来他对这个计划一点都不感兴趣。

grammar.title: 定语从句
grammar.definition: 在复合句中修饰名词或代词的从句，起到定语的作用，被修饰的词叫先行词，关系词连接先行词和从句
grammar.structure: 先行词 + 关系代词/关系副词 + 从句
grammar.usage: 当先行词是人时，常用who/that引导；先行词是物时，常用which/that引导；表示所属关系时用whose引导

examples.en: People who live in Britain needn't despair when they make mistakes like this.
examples.zh: 犯了这类错误的英国人完全不必绝望。

examples.en: A recent case concerns Jane Butlin whose fiance, John, runs a successful furniture business.
examples.zh: 最近的一个案例与简·巴特林有关，她的未婚夫约翰经营着一家生意兴隆的家具店。

grammar.title: 现在完成时的一般疑问句
grammar.definition: 用于询问到目前为止是否发生过某件事，常和ever等词搭配使用，强调经历
grammar.structure: Have/Has + 主语 + ever + 动词过去分词 + 其他?
grammar.usage: 常用于询问对方是否有过某种经历，肯定回答用Yes, 主语+have/has，否定回答用No, 主语+haven't/hasn't

examples.en: Have you ever put your trousers in the washing machine and then remembered there was a large bank note in your back pocket?
examples.zh: 你有没有过把裤子放进洗衣机，然后才想起后兜里还有一张大额钞票的经历？

examples.en: Has she ever travelled abroad alone?
examples.zh: 她有没有过独自出国旅行的经历？

sentencePatterns.pattern: Have you ever done sth and then done sth else?

original.en: Have you ever put your trousers in the washing machine and then remembered there was a large bank note in your back pocket?
original.zh: 你有没有过把裤子放进洗衣机，然后才想起后兜里还有一张大额钞票的经历？

imitations.en: Have you ever fallen asleep in class and then woken up to find the teacher standing next to you?
imitations.zh: 你有没有过在课堂上睡着，醒来时发现老师就站在你旁边的经历？

imitations.en: Have you ever ordered a lot of food and then found you couldn't finish it?
imitations.zh: 你有没有过点了很多食物，结果发现自己吃不完的经历？

original.en: People who live in Britain needn't despair when they make mistakes like this.
original.zh: 犯了这类错误的英国人完全不必绝望。

imitations.en: You needn't despair when you meet difficulties in learning English.
imitations.zh: 你在学习英语时遇到困难不必绝望。

imitations.en: We needn't despair when the experiment fails the first time.
imitations.zh: 第一次实验失败的时候我们不必绝望。

sentencePatterns.pattern: So long as..., sb will do sth.

original.en: So long as there's something to identify, we will give people their money back.
original.zh: 只要还有可以识别的东西，我们就会把钱还给当事人。

imitations.en: So long as you keep trying, you will achieve your goal sooner or later.
imitations.zh: 只要你不断尝试，你迟早会实现目标的。

imitations.en: So long as we finish the work before Friday, we can have a three-day holiday.
imitations.zh: 只要我们在周五前完成工作，我们就可以放三天假。
